texto: This is one of those things that you can never explain to anyone
autor: that's what I want to explain - one of those free-association moments with connections that dissolve when you start to try to put them into words.
explicacao: Citação de that's what I want to explain - one of those free-association moments with connections that dissolve when you start to try to put them into words. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “This is one of those things that you can never explain to anyone” articula reflexao, dan-chaon, stay-awake em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como stay-awake.
